title: Homestead Applied Mathematics & Accounting
subject: Mathematics
description: Master financial cash flow accounting, ROI calculation, concrete volume formulas, roof pitch slope, and structural load math.
learningObjectives: Calculate Return on Investment (ROI) and payback periods for solar and water projects.
Calculate concrete pad cubic yardage formulas: (Length x Width x Thickness) / 27.
Determine roof pitch ratios and rafter lengths.

lessons.title: Concrete Volume Formulas
lessons.content: Concrete is ordered in Cubic Yards. Formula: Multiply Length (ft) x Width (ft) x Thickness (ft), then divide by 27. Example: A 12 ft x 24 ft x 0.5 ft (6-inch thick) slab requires (12 x 24 x 0.5) / 27 = 144 / 27 = 5.33 cubic yards.

flashcards.definition: A unit of volume equal to 27 cubic feet (3 ft x 3 ft x 3 ft).
The length of time required for an investment to generate enough savings to recover its initial cost.

questions.question: How many cubic feet are in 1 Cubic Yard of concrete?

practicalChallenge.title: Slab & Material Cost Estimate
practicalChallenge.instruction: Calculate the cubic yards of concrete needed for a 20 ft x 20 ft x 4-inch (0.33 ft) thick workshop pad!
